title: Contact Center Reporting
lede: The Reporting tab summarizes call activity across your human agents, AI agents, and campaigns. Filter by date, drill into six report categories, and export any view to CSV.

steps.title: Open the Reporting tab
steps.content:
1. Go to Call Center → Contact Center.
  2. Click the Reporting tab (available to Monitor/QA and above).

images.caption: Reporting: category tabs, date presets, filters, and KPIs.
Reporting: category tabs, date presets, filters, and KPIs.

steps.title: Pick a report category
steps.content:
Use the pill tabs to switch between the six categories:

  • General — overall call volume, connect and answer rates, average talk time.
  • Human Agents — handled calls, AHT, occupancy, and supervision activity.
  • AI Agents — per-assistant calls, containment, escalations, and cost.
  • Smart Campaigns — AI dialer campaigns.
  • Human Campaigns — predictive-dialer calls by dial list.
  • Queue — skill-group queue waits and outcomes.

steps.title: Set the date range and filters
steps.content:
1. Choose a date preset: Today, This week, This month, Last 7 days, Last 30 days, or Custom.
  2. Open the Filters bar to narrow by direction, assistant, campaign, owner, human agent, call type, phone number, contact/lead, or call UUID.
  3. Click Refresh to reload, or Clear filters to reset.

steps.title: Export to CSV
steps.content: Click Export (the download icon) to download the current tab as a CSV. The columns match whichever category you're viewing — for example, per-agent handling metrics for Human Agents, or per-assistant containment for AI Agents.
